source_intent.raw_intent: Case 030: I am a chaotic_power_user in global_cross_border. Build a memory_engrave_prompt for blueprint_design_doc using the market_lens. Chaos input type is depth_tier_ambiguity. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a blueprint design document using the market_lens, ensuring all cross-border chaotic inputs are resolved into a governed, auditable structure with explicit validation gates. Scope: - Process the chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context, resolve depth_tier_ambiguity, and produce a memory_engrave_prompt that compiles into a blueprint_design_doc with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The artifact must enforce memory safety and overwrite policy. Constraints: - All memory writes must be non-destructive unless explicitly authorized by overwrite policy. - Validation gates must be embedded at each stage: input sanitization, ambiguity resolution, compliance check, and final commit. - No external data leakage; all processing must occur within sovereign boundary. - The market_lens must be applied to ensure economic and strategic alignment. - Depth tier ambiguity must be resolved to D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE before engraving. Success Criteria: - Memory engrave prompt is fully compiled and validated. - All chaotic input fields are mapped to structured schema. - Validation gates produce pass/fail logs for audit. - Overwrite policy is respected: no existing sovereign memory is altered without explicit consent. - Output contract is complete and ready for Codex runtime execution. Output Contract: - artifact_type: memory_engrave_prompt - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: False - blocked_reason: None - compiled_intent: Objective: Engrave a sovereign memory artifact for a blueprint design document using the market_lens, ensuring all cross-border chaotic inputs are resolved into a governed, auditable structure with explicit validation gates.; Scope: Process the chaotic_power_user input from global_cross_border context, resolve depth_tier_ambiguity, and produce a memory_engrave_prompt that compiles into a blueprint_design_doc with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. The artifact must enforce memory safety and overwrite policy.; Constraints: All memory writes must be non-destructive unless explicitly authorized by overwrite policy.; Validation gates must be embedded at each stage: input sanitization, ambiguity resolution, compliance check, and final commit.; No external data leakage; all processing must occur within sovereign boundary.; The market_lens must be applied to ensure economic and strategic alignment.; Depth tier ambiguity must be resolved to D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE before engraving.; Success Criteria: Memory engrave prompt is fully compiled and validated.; All chaotic input fields are mapped to structured schema.; Validation gates produce pass/fail logs for audit.; Overwrite policy is respected: no existing sovereign memory is altered without explicit consent.; Output contract is complete and ready for Codex runtime execution.; Output Contract: This document is the final compiled intent for DSS-030, ready for Codex runtime execution.
